deviations.design_source: flow-web.json > responsive_patterns > sidebar_behavior; brief.json > strategy: CSS Grid minmax + breakpoint strategy
deviations.implementation: app/pipeline/page.tsx uses fixed 3-column layout: width 300px + flex:1 + width 420px. No media queries, no useIsMobile hook.
deviations.delta: Pipeline page overflows on screens <1020px. Design requires responsive breakpoints at 768/1024px with vertical stacking on mobile.
deviations.suggestion: Add useIsMobile() hook to pipeline page. On mobile: single-column layout with collapsible panels. On tablet: 2-column (list + detail). Reference IMShell.tsx pattern.

deviations.design_source: flow-web.json > responsive_patterns > breakpoints; brief.json > mobile available rate > 80%
deviations.implementation: app/graph/page.tsx uses fixed flex layout with no responsive breakpoints. Stats cards use inline grid with no wrapping.
deviations.delta: Graph page not usable on mobile/tablet. Design requires adaptation at 768px and 1024px breakpoints.
deviations.suggestion: Add media query or useIsMobile() for graph page. On mobile: stack stats cards vertically, simplify topology view to list mode.

deviations.design_source: stories.json > story-3: Workflow mobile read-only with bottom sheet; edge.json > Workflow Canvas (Mobile Read-only)
deviations.implementation: app/workflow/page.tsx has no responsive handling. WorkflowCanvas minimum width ~780px. No mobile read-only mode.
deviations.delta: Story-3 acceptance criteria not met: no read-only overview, no bottom sheet for node config, no pinch zoom. Implementation not started.
deviations.suggestion: Phase 1 (P0): Add mobile read-only mode with thumbnail view. Phase 2: BottomSheet for node properties. Use existing BottomSheet component from src/components/ui.

deviations.design_source: flow-web.json > IMShell floating buttons; brief.json > touch targets >= 44px; stories.json > story-1 AC3, story-2 AC4
deviations.implementation: IMShell.tsx floating nav buttons are 36x36px (width: 36, height: 36). App-layout hamburger button also 36x36px.
deviations.delta: Touch targets are 36px, design requires minimum 44px on tablet and 48px on mobile. Violates brief.json quantitative criteria and story-1/story-2 acceptance criteria.
deviations.suggestion: Increase floating button size to 44px minimum (48px preferred for mobile). Update floatBtn() factory in IMShell.tsx and app-layout.tsx hamburger button.

deviations.design_source: flow-web.json > responsive_patterns > right_panel_behavior: bottom sheet (60vh); stories.json > story-3 AC2: bottom sheet max 60% height
deviations.implementation: IMShell.tsx BottomSheet maxHeight='70vh'.
deviations.delta: BottomSheet is 70vh but design specifies 60vh. 10vh overshoot reduces visible chat area on mobile.
deviations.suggestion: Change maxHeight from '70vh' to '60vh' in IMShell.tsx BottomSheet props.

deviations.design_source: flow-web.json > responsive_patterns > sidebar_behavior: Desktop 220px | Tablet 280px drawer | Mobile 85vw drawer
deviations.implementation: App-layout drawer uses GlobalSidebar component (fixed width from sidebar CSS). IMShell drawer uses 280px fixed. No 85vw mobile variant.
deviations.delta: Two separate drawer implementations with different widths. Mobile drawer not using 85vw as specified in flow-web.json.
deviations.suggestion: Unify drawer width strategy. Consider 85vw max-width: 280px for mobile drawer in IMShell.

deviations.design_source: extract.json > tokens.color: 82 CSS variable tokens; check.json F-003: unify style systems
deviations.implementation: app/page.tsx (Home) still uses extensive inline CSSProperties. Pipeline page uses 100% inline styles. Skills page uses inline styles. Only IM and Models pages primarily use CSS variables through globals.css classes.
deviations.delta: 3 of 4 style systems identified in F-003 still coexist: (1) globals.css classes, (2) inline style + CSS vars, (3) Tailwind utilities (observability). Full unification not achieved.
deviations.suggestion: Migrate page.tsx inline styles to PageLayout/Card/NavCard CSS classes. Migrate pipeline inline styles to dedicated CSS classes or use shared UI components.

deviations.design_source: extract.json > tokens.color.key_tokens: --bg-void: #050a14
deviations.implementation: globals.css :root --bg-void changed to #0f172a (from original #050a14 in extract.json). --bg-panel changed from #0a1020 to rgba(30,41,59,0.92).
deviations.delta: Color token values were intentionally redesigned (slate-based instead of blue-tinted) during Phase 4. The extract.json baseline is outdated. No functional issue, but documentation drift.
deviations.suggestion: Update extract.json to reflect current color values. Or regenerate extract after QA cycle.

deviations.design_source: check.json F-006: heading hierarchy; WCAG 1.3.1 Info and Relationships
deviations.implementation: Most pages use <h1> from PageLayout but section headings use <div> or styled <span>. Observability page uses h1 then jumps to h3 (skipping h2). Settings page uses <h2> for sections (correct).
deviations.delta: Heading hierarchy still flat in most pages. Observability has h1->h3 skip. Design requires semantic h1>h2>h3 nesting.
deviations.suggestion: Replace <div> section titles with <h2> in page.tsx, pipeline/page.tsx. Fix observability h3 to h2. Ensure all subsection headings use <h3> under parent <h2>.

deviations.design_source: extract.json > tokens.typography.base_size: 13px, scale starts at 10px; check.json F-007: min 11px
deviations.implementation: globals.css defines font scale. Pipeline page uses 11px for timestamps. CSS classes like .stat-label may still use small sizes.
deviations.delta: Most small font instances now >= 11px. Some 10px instances may remain in status labels. Minor as the 10px floor was in extract.json design tokens.
deviations.suggestion: Audit remaining < 11px font sizes. Ensure no text critical for comprehension is below 11px.

deviations.design_source: extract.json > tokens.spacing: 4px anchor, 7 tokens (--space-1 through --space-7); check.json F-048: spacing system
deviations.implementation: CSS variables --space-1 through --space-7 defined in globals.css. Many components use hardcoded pixel values instead of spacing tokens (e.g., IMShell padding: '8px 8px 0', pipeline gap: '16px').
deviations.delta: Spacing tokens defined but adoption is inconsistent. Inline styles use raw px values instead of var(--space-N).
deviations.suggestion: Replace hardcoded spacing in inline styles with var(--space-N) tokens. Consider creating shared style objects.

deviations.design_source: extract.json > tokens.radius: --radius-sm: 6px, --radius-md: 10px, --radius-lg: 16px; check.json F-015
deviations.implementation: Radius tokens defined in globals.css (--radius-sm: 6px, --radius-md: 10px, --radius-lg: 14px, --radius-full: 999px). CSS classes .btn, .card use these tokens. Inline styles sometimes use var(--radius-sm) correctly (IMShell floatBtn).
deviations.delta: Radius token values mostly match extract.json except --radius-lg is 14px vs 16px in design. Minor discrepancy. Inline styles using tokens is good.
deviations.suggestion: Align --radius-lg to 16px per extract.json, or update extract.json to document the 14px decision.

deviations.design_source: extract.json > icon_set: lucide-react v0.469.0, outlined style, 16px default
deviations.implementation: All icon imports verified from lucide-react: Menu, PanelRight, X, AlertTriangle, ShieldOff, MessageSquare, etc. No mixed icon libraries detected.

deviations.design_source: stories.json > story-6 AC3: retry button for retryable errors; edge.json > error states with retry
deviations.implementation: Toast component (src/components/ui/toast.tsx) supports 4 types (success/error/warning/info) with close button and auto-dismiss. But no retry button prop. Toast API has no action/retry parameter.
deviations.delta: Story-6 acceptance criterion 'retryable errors show retry button' not implemented. Toast only has dismiss (x) button.
deviations.suggestion: Add optional `action` prop to Toast: { label: string; onClick: () => void }. Render as button alongside close. Update toast.error() to accept action config.

deviations.design_source: stories.json > story-6 AC2: auto-dismiss 5 seconds; check.json F-035
deviations.implementation: Toast default duration is 4000ms (4 seconds). Design specifies 5000ms (5 seconds).
deviations.delta: Auto-dismiss is 1 second shorter than design specification.
deviations.suggestion: Change default duration from 4000 to 5000 in showToast() function signature.

deviations.design_source: check.json F-014: replace alert() with toast; stories.json > story-6 AC4: no alert()/console.error
deviations.implementation: alert() still used in: skills-list.tsx (lines 102,104,132,139), remote-skill-search.tsx (lines 63,69), workspaces-list.tsx (lines 31,36), useImActions.ts (lines 373,397). Total: 10 remaining alert() calls.
deviations.delta: 10 alert() calls remain across 4 files. Story-6 AC4 requires zero alert()/console.error patterns. These were supposed to be replaced by unified toast.
deviations.suggestion: Replace all remaining alert() calls with toast.error() or toast.warning(). Import toast from @/components/ui in each file.

deviations.design_source: check.json F-053: replace window.prompt with custom modal
deviations.implementation: useImActions.ts line 216 still uses window.prompt() for sub-agent role input.
deviations.delta: window.prompt() is a browser-blocking native dialog. Design requires custom modal for consistency and accessibility.
deviations.suggestion: Replace window.prompt with a custom input modal/dialog using existing ConfirmDialog pattern or new InputDialog component.

deviations.design_source: check.json F-008: empty message list; edge.json > IM Page > empty-collection state
deviations.implementation: IMMessageList.tsx uses Virtuoso for virtual scrolling. When messages array is empty, Virtuoso renders nothing - no empty state UI.
deviations.delta: Empty chat shows blank area with no guidance. Edge.json specifies: '还没有任何群组对话' + CTA button.
deviations.suggestion: Add empty state check before Virtuoso: if messages.length === 0, render EmptyState component with message icon + '发送第一条消息开始对话' + guidance.

deviations.design_source: edge.json > critical_missing: offline-no-network (blocker), offline-poor-connection (high)
deviations.implementation: No offline detection UI found. No navigator.onLine check, no offline banner, no bottom bar for offline state.
deviations.delta: Edge.json marks offline-no-network as blocker severity. No implementation of any offline/poor-connection state across any page.
deviations.suggestion: Add useOnline() hook wrapping navigator.onLine + online/offline events. Show fixed bottom banner when offline. Disable send input when offline.

deviations.design_source: edge.json > Global > error-not-found (404 page); edge.json > Global > error-server (Error Boundary)
deviations.implementation: app/global-error.tsx exists with error page UI. Individual route error.tsx files exist for 8 routes. However, no custom 404 not-found.tsx page found.
deviations.delta: Error boundaries are implemented (positive finding). Missing: custom 404 page for unknown routes (Next.js not-found.tsx).
deviations.suggestion: Create app/not-found.tsx with design-specified 404 UI: FileQuestion icon + '页面不存在' + '返回工作台' button.

deviations.design_source: check.json F-005: focus-visible; WCAG 2.4.7
deviations.implementation: globals.css lines 2265-2306: comprehensive focus-visible styles for all interactive elements (*, inputs, buttons, links, selects). Uses var(--cyan) 2px outline with offset. Also includes .sr-only utility class.

deviations.design_source: check.json F-021: ARIA landmarks; WCAG 1.3.1
deviations.implementation: Partial landmarks: <main> in app-layout.tsx, <nav> in global-sidebar.tsx + skills/page.tsx, <aside> in AgentSidebar.tsx, <header> in PageLayout.tsx. But: IMShell mobile layout uses only <div>. IM page right section uses <div> not <aside>. Many page-level containers are <div>.
deviations.delta: Landmarks partially adopted. IMShell (the core page) has zero semantic landmarks in mobile mode. Right panel never uses <aside>.
deviations.suggestion: Add <aside> to IMShell right panel (both mobile BottomSheet wrapper and desktop right section). Add role='complementary' to BottomSheet. Use <nav> for IMShell sidebar drawer.

deviations.design_source: check.json F-022: Agent tree keyboard accessibility; WCAG 2.1.1
deviations.implementation: AgentSidebar.tsx uses div + onClick for agent tree items. No role='treeitem', no tabIndex, no onKeyDown handler for Enter/Space activation.
deviations.delta: Agent tree items are not keyboard-focusable or navigable. Screen reader users cannot interact with agent list.
deviations.suggestion: Add role='tree' to container, role='treeitem' to each item, tabIndex={0}, onKeyDown for Enter/Space. Or use <button> elements for each agent item.

deviations.design_source: check.json F-020: text-dim contrast ratio; WCAG 1.4.3
deviations.implementation: globals.css --text-dim: rgba(148,163,184,0.65) on --bg-void: #0f172a. Approximate contrast ratio: ~4.2:1 (improved from original 2.8:1 but still below 4.5:1 AA threshold).
deviations.delta: Contrast improved significantly but still 0.3:1 short of WCAG AA 4.5:1 for normal text.
deviations.suggestion: Increase --text-dim opacity from 0.65 to 0.72 or lighten the base color to reach 4.5:1 ratio.

deviations.design_source: check.json F-037: reduced motion for Viz; WCAG 2.3.3
deviations.implementation: globals.css has @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) at line 2774. src/lib/motion.ts has getReducedVariant() helper. IMMessageList uses reduced motion fallback. But TopoAnimCanvas.tsx (Canvas 2D) may not check reduced motion preference.
deviations.delta: CSS animations and framer-motion variants properly handle reduced motion. Canvas-based topo animation may not.
deviations.suggestion: Add prefers-reduced-motion check in TopoAnimCanvas.tsx. When matched, disable spatial movement and only use opacity transitions.

resolved_check_findings.resolution: Added breakpoints at 1280px, 1024px, 768px, 640px in globals.css. IMShell fully responsive with drawer + BottomSheet pattern. App-layout has mobile drawer with auto-close on navigation.
Overflow handling moved to .app container and individual panel elements. Each panel manages its own overflow-y: auto.
Comprehensive focus-visible system added: global *:focus-visible ring, specific styles for inputs, buttons, links, selects. Also added .sr-only utility class for screen-reader-only content.
ConfirmProvider and useConfirm hook created (confirm-dialog.tsx). Confirm dialog wraps destructive operations with custom UI modal. Fallback to window.confirm if provider not mounted.
skills-list.tsx now uses useConfirm() before delete operations. Consistent with workspaces-list.tsx pattern.
Pipeline page now uses fontFamily: 'var(--font-body)' for body and 'var(--font-display)' for headings. System-ui removed.
AgentStatusCard.tsx no longer contains hardcoded hex values (#1a1a1a, #333, #888, etc.). All colors now use CSS variables.
Unified toast system (src/components/ui/toast.tsx) with: close button (x), auto-dismiss timer (4000ms default), stacking support via flex column. Consumed by 4+ pages via toast API.
AgentSidebar.tsx adds aria-label={status} to status-dot elements, providing screen reader text for status state.
